sections.paragraph:
ἀποσύρω 1 aor. 3 pl. ἀπέσυραν 4 Macc. 9:28 cod. A; inf. ἀποσῦραι (Thu. et al.; 4 Macc 9:28; Jos., Bell. 3, 243, C. Ap. 2, 114) to tear away someth. and so lay bare, tear/scrape off τὶ someth. of skin (Alciphron 3, 32, 2 τὸ δέρμα τ. κεφαλῆς) MPol 8:3.—DELG s.v. σύρω.

aor. aor. = aorist

  1. pl. = plural

inf. inf. = infinitive

Thu Thu , V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

someth. someth. = something

MPol MPol = Martyrdom of Polycarp; after II a.d.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 123
